periods.name: Overnight
periods.detailed_forecast: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 70. South wind around 13 mph.

periods.name: Wednesday
periods.short_forecast: Mostly Cloudy then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailed_forecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms after 2pm. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 89. Southwest wind around 14 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

periods.name: Wednesday Night
periods.detailed_forecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 2am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 75. Southwest wind around 13 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

periods.name: Thursday
periods.short_forecast: Sunny then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailed_forecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms after 5pm. Sunny, with a high near 96. Heat index values as high as 104. West wind 6 to 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
